phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão histórico de madeira do Café Saudade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN eesh-TAW-ree-koo DIH muh-DAY-ruh DOO kuh-FEH sow-DAH-dih?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao responsável da caixa ou ao gerente de turno.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH KEYE-shuh OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih DIH TOO-ruh-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the cashier or shift manager.

responses.english: Ask the cashier or shift manager.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH KEYE-shuh OHW OW zheh-RAYNG-tih DIH TOO-ruh-noo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao responsável da caixa ou ao gerente de turno.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o balcão histórico de madeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW bahl-KOWN eesh-TAW-ree-koo DIH muh-DAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao responsável da caixa ou ao garçom.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH KEYE-shuh OHW OW guh-ruh-SOHNG.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the cashier manager or the waiter.

responses.english: Ask the cashier manager or the waiter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH KEYE-shuh OHW OW guh-ruh-SOHNG.
responses.local: Pergunte ao responsável da caixa ou ao garçom.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão histórico de madeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN eesh-TAW-ree-koo DIH muh-DAY-ruh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao responsável da caixa; eles podem indicar-lhe o local exato.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH KEYE-shuh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter or the cashier manager; they can show you the exact location.

responses.english: Ask the waiter or the cashier manager; they can show you the exact location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW rehsh-poong-SAH-vehl DUH KEYE-shuh; EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR-LYIH AW loo-KAHL eh-ZAH-too.
responses.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao responsável da caixa; eles podem indicar-lhe o local exato.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the terrace with palace view is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde fica o terraço com vista para o palácio?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo KOHM VEESH-tuh PUH-ruh AW puh-LAHS-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Sintra cafés often use terse street directions. 'Olá' is an acceptable casual greeting before a question in a Portuguese café.

likely_response.translation_en: Go up the stairs, on the right.

responses.english: Go up the stairs, on the right.
